Publications논문

  • Vitisin B, extracted from Vitis vinifera, enhances memory function and neuroprotective effects in scopolamine-induced memory-impaired mice
    Kim WS, Choi J, Kim SS, Kim JH, Han YE, Kwak MJ, Oh SJ, Lee B, Cho IH, Choi CW, Hong GS, Kim MS
    Biomed Pharmacother., 2026 Co-author공동저자

  • Neuroprotective effects of Gnetin H from Paeonia lactiflora via CREB-BDNF pathway restoration in a scopolamine-induced memory deficit model
    Kim JH, Kim SS, Lee EH, Oh SJ, Hong GS, Lee B, Cho IH, Choi CW, Kang T, Kim MS
    Eur J Pharmacol., 2025 First Author제1저자
    DOI
  • Enhanced neuronal activity by suffruticosol A extracted from Paeonia lactiflora via partly BDNF signaling in scopolamine-induced memory-impaired mice
    Kim JH, Han YE, Oh SJ, Lee B, Kwon O, Choi CW, Kim MS
    Sci Rep., 2023 First Author제1저자
